title: Pichisermollodes nigropaleacea

The classification of Pichisermollodes nigropaleacea includes the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, the clade Eudicots, the clade Asterids, and the family Rubiaceae. Within the family Rubiaceae, Pichisermollodes nigropaleacea is classified as part of the genus Pichisermollodes. Further classification of the species is needed for more specific information.
